title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 36-A.  POLYGRAPHISTS

§2831.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known, and may be cited, as the Polygraphist Act.  

Added by Acts 1980, No. 761, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 36-A.  POLYGRAPHISTS
§2831.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known, and may be cited, as the Polygraphist Act.
Added by Acts 1980, No. 761, §1.
